patch.description:
Update the data retention period for the current user.

Args:
    data: Request body containing data_retention_days
    current_user: The current authenticated user

schema.title: Response List Minutes For Transcription Transcription  Transcription Id  Minutes Get
Response List Minute Versions Minutes  Minute Id  Versions Get
Response List Minute Tasks Minutes  Minute Id  Tasks Get
Response Get User Templates User Templates Get

get.description:
Returns modules and navigation items for the current user's service_domain and role.

Filters by:
- user.service_domain_id (from UserOrgRole table)
- user.role (from UserOrgRole table)
- tenant config (config/*.yaml)

Returns:
- modules: List of module manifests (id, label, icon, routes, deps, feature flags)
- navigation: List of navigation items with labels, hrefs, icons
- service_domain: Current user's domain
- role: Current user's role
Check if current user has admin access.
Get detailed configuration for a specific tenant.
Get audit trail for a specific tenant configuration.
Get version history for a specific tenant configuration.
